message:
fix(query): use column_name for insert field matching and add joined inheritance JOINs

Two related fixes in the query builder:

1. InsertBuilder and InsertManyBuilder now match row fields against
   field.column_name instead of field.name, fixing a bug where Rust
   field names and SQL column names diverge (e.g., renamed columns)

2. Added joined-table inheritance query support:
   - joined_inheritance_join(): generates INNER JOIN on matching PKs
     between child and parent tables
   - joined_inheritance_select_columns(): emits table-prefixed aliases
     for both child and parent columns to avoid ambiguity
   - Integrated into Select builder's build methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
